Event: Clans Game
Event Date: 30/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: D36
Blood Guard Daggers

When attacking, has a 17% chance of dealing 150% damage in 5 seconds.
For the duration of the battle, damage from the unit's attacks dealt to frozen enemies ignores 85% of the target's armor.

Once in a while, the unit freezes the attack target and all enemies in a small radius around it for 5 sec. During that time, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 5 sec.

Once every 6 sec., the unit steals 25% of all stats from all frozen enemy units for 5 sec., and deals physical damage equal to 500% of own attack to them.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌗🌚
